commit.message:
Fix Latest Videos showing non-video pages + add smoke test guard

ROOT CAUSE: Query used 'Section != blog' which let any non-blog page
through (prompt-guide techniques, CA builder sub-pages, etc.)

FIX: Filter by 'Params.youtube_id != nil' — only pages with a YouTube
ID appear in Latest Videos. This is definitive and future-proof.

PREVENTION: Smoke test now checks that all video cards have YouTube
thumbnails (i.ytimg.com). If a non-video page leaks in, it fails.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add database credential diagnostic endpoints and fix guide

- Add /api/debug/credentials endpoint to show environment variable status
- Add RENDER_DATABASE_FIX.md with step-by-step credential verification
- Explains 28P01 authentication error and common causes
- Provides clear testing steps with debug endpoints

This helps identify if the issue is:
1. Missing environment variables
2. Incorrect credentials
3. Database connection problem

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: remove stale tar before podman save to avoid overwrite error

podman save with docker-archive format refuses to overwrite an existing
file. Add rm -f before save so retried or watcher-triggered builds don't
fail when a tar from a previous run already exists.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Chat - add null checks for editingSession across await boundaries (#309239)

Chat - add null checks for editingSession across await boundaries (#309129)

awaitStatsForSession reads model.editingSession across multiple await
points. If the model is disposed during one of these awaits, the
editingSession property is nulled and the next access crashes.

Re-check model.editingSession after each await and bail out with
undefined when the session has gone away.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(web): design system foundation — Atomic Design structure, Tailwind CSS, and primitive components (#63)

* Initial plan

* feat(web): set up design system with atomic design structure, Tailwind CSS, and foundational components

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/nelson-arbelaez-epam/todos/sessions/98f11ee4-ac7c-4e0b-bc5d-2e395eaf2ee4

Co-authored-by: nelson-arbelaez-epam <273367797+nelson-arbelaez-epam@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(web): add NavBar atom with React Router integration

- Presentational navigation bar component
- Accepts links array and optional brand slot
- Uses React Router Link for client-side routing
- Fully tested with 6 unit tests

* feat(web): add FormField molecule (Label + Input composition)

- Combines Label + Input atoms into accessible form control
- Accepts label text and optional required flag
- Forwards Input props (error, type, disabled, etc.)
- Fully tested with 8 unit tests covering all props and states

* refactor(web): wire MainLayout + NavBar into App.tsx

- Application shell now uses MainLayout template
- NavBar atom passed as header slot with brand
- Removed manual layout and inline Link composition
- App now correctly structured per ADR 0021

* refactor(web): refactor RegisterForm to use design system atoms/molecules

- RegisterForm now composes FormField (molecule) + Button + Text atoms
- Replaced raw input/label/button HTML with design system components
- Replaced CSS module styles with Tailwind utilities
- Form layout now uses design tokens (spacing, colors)
- All tests passing; functionality unchanged

* refactor(web): migrate pages to design system tokens (62)

- Home and About pages now use Text atom with semantic variants
- Register.tsx inline style replaced with Tailwind utilities
- All pages follow ADR 0021 Atomic Design pattern
- Pages are thin presentational containers using design tokens

* chore(web): prune legacy Vite boilerplate from App.css

- Removed .counter, .hero, #center, #next-steps, #docs, #spacer, .ticks styles
- These were example Vite app stubs never used in the project
- App.css now serves as a documented override entry point only
- Component styles belong in co-located CSS Modules; base styles in index.css

* fix(web.62): update RegisterForm tests to work with FormField molecule

- RegisterForm tests were using getByLabelText with exact text strings
- FormField adds labels through Label + Input composition with required asterisk
- Updated queries to use case-insensitive regexes that match label text including asterisk
- All 6 RegisterForm tests now pass (renders fields, validation, submission, loading)

* docs(adr): establish data-testid strategy for form field testing

- Add ADR 0025 documenting preference for data-testid over getByLabelText
- Improves test stability by decoupling from label text variations
- Reduces brittleness from UI tweaks, i18n, and label changes

feat(web): implement data-testid on FormField molecule

- Add data-testid={form-field--${id}} to FormField input
- Update FormField.test.tsx to use getByTestId queries
- Maintains semantic queries for accessibility (getByRole, getByText)

test(web): update RegisterForm tests for data-testid strategy

- Replace all getByLabelText() calls with getByTestId()
- All 6 RegisterForm tests passing
- Preserves getByRole queries for buttons and alerts

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: nelson-arbelaez-epam <273367797+nelson-arbelaez-epam@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Nelson Arbelaez <nelson_arbelaez@epam.com>

fix: dropdown option text invisible in dark mode — add explicit bg/color on <option>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(jetson): rewrite step 8 with temp file + sys.argv (no env vars)

Previous approaches all failed because:
- Shell grep+cut: CRLF issues from Windows .env files
- Heredoc + env vars: export order wrong, then still failed
- os.environ: unreliable across sudo boundaries

New approach is bulletproof:
- Write Python script to /tmp/_agrikd_inject_creds.py
- Pass cfg_path and repo_root as sys.argv[1] and sys.argv[2]
- No env vars, no heredoc, no shell variable capture
- Also use cat+heredoc for minimal config (not python3 -c)
- Verbose debug output at every step
- Cleanup temp file after execution

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: correct Homepage URL and author info in pyproject.toml

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: apply rust-skills fixes (err-no-unwrap-prod, own-borrow-over-clone)

- parse_version: replace split().next().unwrap() with split_once() — avoids
  panic on external API data and removes unnecessary String allocation
- service_status widget: commit.short_value().unwrap() → unwrap_or_default()
- jira widget: new_ticket_id.clone().unwrap_or_default() → as_deref().unwrap_or_default()
  eliminates unnecessary String clone; pass &str directly without redundant re-ref
- logs render (activity + app log): consume wrap_message result via into_iter()
  instead of index+clone — moves Strings instead of copying them in render hot path
- jira state test: new_ticket_id.clone().unwrap() → as_deref().unwrap()

Rules applied: err-no-unwrap-prod, anti-unwrap-abuse, own-borrow-over-clone,
anti-clone-excessive, own-slice-over-vec, perf-iter-over-index

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Update n8n workflow: rewrite 15 nodes with improved prompts and logic

- Brief Parser: gpt-4o, maxTokens 8000, strict JSON-only system prompt
- Validation & Preparation: robust markdown-fence stripping, proportional word count distribution
- Task Router: fix caseSensitive/typeValidation options, fallback to analytical
- Academic/Evaluative/Governance/Resource/Reflective Writers: gpt-4o, maxTokens 4096, distinction-level prompts
- Quality Check: ±10% word count, heading, citation, tone and theory checks
- Aggregate Sections: sort by task then sub_section_id, group by task
- Reference Generator: gpt-4o, maxTokens 6000, 15-25 Harvard refs
- Final Assembly: TOC, task sections, references, appendix placeholder
- Convert to HTML: binary data output, cover sheet, markdown-to-HTML converter
- Flow Reviewer: gpt-4o, maxTokens 16000, full document review
- Apply Flow Review: robust $input/.all() with Final Assembly fallback

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(jetson): export env vars BEFORE heredoc + rewrite step 8

Root cause: CFG_PATH and REPO_ROOT_PATH were exported AFTER
the Python heredoc, so os.environ read empty strings.

Rewrite step 8 as a single robust Python script:
- Export env vars before heredoc (not after!)
- Python reads .env files directly (no grep/cut/shell issues)
- Handles CRLF, encoding, missing files gracefully
- Prints debug: config path, repo root, which files found/missing
- Verifies write succeeded with re-read
- Clean fallback: exit(0)=ok, exit(2)=interactive, else=error

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

ci: opt into Node.js 24 for GitHub Actions

Set FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24=true to suppress Node 20
deprecation warnings ahead of the June 2026 forced migration.

commit.message:
fix: 修复安装时 GitHub API JSON 输出泄漏到终端的问题

- 将版本号解析从 grep/sed 改为 jq，避免紧凑 JSON 时 sed 贪婪匹配导致整个 JSON 输出
- 修复 install_xray() 和 update_geodata() 两处相同问题
- 修复 do_uninstall() 未清理 /etc/systemd/system/xray.service（仅清理了旧路径）

fix: Caddy owns ports 80/443 directly, deploy evicts any squatter container

Root cause: Traefik is STOPPED on Hostinger VPS, quorum (PaperPilot) is Running
but was on port 8080. Something else (Phoenix) occupies port 80/443.

Changes:
- Caddy: ports 80:80 and 443:443 (direct binding, no Traefik needed)
- Caddyfile: paperpilotapp.com with auto-HTTPS (Caddy handles Let's Encrypt)
- Deploy script: stops any container on ports 80/443 before starting PaperPilot
  so Phoenix nginx is evicted cleanly on every deploy

commit.message:
fix(jetson): fix config auto-fill (CRLF strip + debug output + verify)

Root cause: .env.development has Windows CRLF line endings.
grep on Linux extracts values with trailing \r, causing silent
failures when injecting into config.json.

Fixes:
- Add 'tr -d \r' to strip carriage returns from extracted values
- Add .strip() in Python injection for extra safety
- Add debug output showing which .env file found
- Add verification step to confirm write succeeded
- Show extracted URL/KEY prefix for debugging

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: bump cache_version to 2026041260 — force CDN to serve updated JS/CSS

Previous deploys used stale cache_version so browser/CDN served old broken JS.

Co-authored-by: xndcn <1317792+xndcn@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: FTS Chinese tokenization + LIKE fallback for zero-result queries

Two improvements to ftsSearch():
1. preprocessFtsQuery(): adds spaces at CJK↔ASCII transitions so
   'RAG向量' becomes 'RAG 向量' for proper FTS5 tokenization. Also
   strips '…' and other special chars that cause FTS5 MATCH errors.
2. LIKE fallback: when FTS returns fewer results than the limit,
   supplement with LIKE-based substring search. Handles compound
   Chinese terms that FTS5 unicode61 tokenizer treats as opaque
   tokens (e.g. '数据库设计' → finds pages with '数据库...设计').

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
